framework.name: California AB 316 Forecloses 'AI Did It' Defense
framework.description: As of Jan 1 2026, California law precludes using an AI system's autonomous operation as a defense to liability. Deployer bears liability regardless of control claims. This implicitly means in a delegation chain, the human principal at the top cannot disclaim — but the statute doesn't address WHICH deployer in a multi-org chain.
framework.raw_quote: AB 316, which took effect January 1, 2026, precludes defendants from using an AI system's autonomous operation as a defense to liability claims.

source.title: When AI Agents Misbehave: Governance and Security for ... - Our Take
